title: genista pumila subsp. rigidissima
intro: Genista pumila subsp. rigidissima, also known as the dwarf broom or compact broom, is a shrub-like perennial plant belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Genista pumila subsp. rigidissima are said to include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
